name: Adrienne Berene
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a blue velvet outfit with gold-trimmed shoes, usually seen carrying a book and a small amount of gold.

Race:
Breton

Personality Keywords:
Scholarly, studious, professional

Role:
Head of the Skingrad Mages Guild and Destruction spell merchant.

Home Location Information:
She resides and works within the Skingrad Mages Guildhall, using both the library on the second floor and her private room in the Living Quarters.

Daily Routine:
She studies in the guild library from 8am until midday, reading from The Eastern Provinces. From midday to 2pm she takes a break for lunch. She resumes her studies in the library from 2pm until 6pm. At 8pm, after dinner, she continues reading in her room in the Living Quarters until midnight. She then sleeps for eight hours. If her routine is interrupted, she wanders the guildhall. She offers spells for sale whenever she is not sleeping or eating.

Abilities:
She specializes in Destruction magic and sells a wide range of Destruction spells.

Personality – Dedicated Scholar:
Adrienne Berene spends most of her waking hours reading and studying, following a strict daily schedule centered on her research. She serves as head of the Skingrad Mages Guild despite holding the rank of Evoker rather than Wizard. When approached outside of meals or sleep, she conducts business as a spell merchant, focusing on the sale of Destruction spells.
author: Bethesda
